title: Compare PDF Files — Spot Differences Locally
h1: Compare Two PDF Documents Side by Side
description: Upload two PDFs and highlight differences between them entirely in your browser. No upload to servers. Ideal for users in Jerusalem.

sections.title: Why Compare PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Comparing contract versions or document revisions often involves highly sensitive content. Do it entirely offline.

steps.title: Load Both PDFs
steps.description: Select the two PDF versions to compare.

steps.title: View Differences
steps.description: Highlighted changes appear side by side.

steps.title: Export Diff Report
steps.description: Download a comparison report with all changes marked.

sections.title: Document Comparison for Jerusalem Law Firms
sections.content: Legal professionals in Jerusalem compare contract revisions without uploading privileged documents to cloud services.

sections.title: Privileged Documents Stay Private
sections.content: Compare NDAs, contracts, and regulatory filings without any server interaction.

sections.title: Instant Side-by-Side Comparison
sections.content: Compare 100-page documents in seconds with highlighted differences rendered in-browser.

faqs.q: What types of differences are detected?
faqs.a: Text additions, deletions, and formatting changes are highlighted.
For scanned PDFs, use OCR first to extract text before comparing.
Yes, download a marked-up PDF showing all differences.

faqs.q: How many versions can I compare?
faqs.a: Two documents at a time in the side-by-side view.
